titleStmt.title: SII 8.5: original edition by K.V. Subrahmanya Aiyer
No. 5. (A.R. No. 419 of 1902). ON THE SAME WALLS.

revisionDesc.change: Further conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)
Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti śrī . tirumaṉṉi vaḷara Iruṉilamaṭant Aiyum poṟceyappāvaiyuñ cirttaṉic ce yūḻi yuḷiṭaituṟaināṭu n tuṭarvaṉaveli paṭar vaṉavāciyum cuḷḷiccūḻ matiḷ koḷḷippākkaiyum naṇṇaṟ karumuraṇ maṇṇaikkaṭakkamum porukaṭa liḻattaraiyartam muṭiyum Āṅkavaṉ teviyar Oṅkeḻil muṭiyum muṉṉavarpakkaṟ ṟeṉṉavar vaitta cun=ta ra muṭiyum ḻamaṇṭala muḻuvatum Eṟi mayiṟ cūṭum kulataṉamākiya palar pukaḻu muṭiyuñ ceṅkatir mālaiyuñ caṅkatir velait tolperuṅ kāvaṟ pal paḻan=ti vuñ ceṟuviṟ ciṉavi lirupattorukāl Araicukaḷai kaṭṭa paracurāmaṉ melvarum cān=ti mattivaraṇ karuti Irutti(ti)ya cempoṟ tiruttaku muṭiyum payaṅkoṭu paḻimika mucaṅkiyil mutukiṭṭoḷitta cayaciṅkaṉ Aḷap ṭum piṭiyal Iraṭṭapāṭi Eḻarai Ilakkamum navanetikkulap perumalaikaḷum vikkiramavirar cakkarakoṭṭamum mutirpaṭavallai maturamaṇṭalamuṅ kāmiṭaivaḷaiy nāmaṇaikkoṇaiyum veñcilaivirar pañcappaḷḷiyum pācaṭaippaḻaṉa mācuṇitecamum Ayarvil vaṇkīrtti yātinakaravaiyiṟ can=ti raṉ tolkulat tin=ti rarataṉai viḷaiyamarkkaḷattu kkiḷaiyoṭum piṭittup palataṉattoṭu niṟai kulataṉakkuvaiyuṅ kiṭṭaruñcerumiḷai Oṭṭaviṣai yamum pūcurarcer nalkkocalaināṭu n=ta ṉmapālaṉai vemmuṉai yaḻittu vaṇṭuṟaicolait taṇṭaputtiyum Iraṇacūraṉai muraṇurat tākkit tikkaṇaikirttit takkaṇailāṭamuṅ kovin=ta can=ta ṉ māviḻi- n=to ṭa taṅkāta cāral vaṅkāḷatecamu n=to ṭukaṭaṟ caṅkuvoṭṭal mahipālaṉai veñcamarviḷākat tañcuvittaruḷi Oṇṭiṟal yāṉaiyum peṇṭir paṇṭāramum nit
tippirakkamum Ārttavaṉakanakarp porttoḻil vā toraṇamum moyttoḷir puṉaimaṇip putavamuṅ kaṉamaṇi kkatavamum niṟaicirvicaiyamu n tuṟainir paṉṉaiyum vaṉmalaiyūreyiṟ ṟoṉmalaiyūrum Āḻkaṭa lakaḻcūḻ māyiruṭiṅkamuṅ kalaṅkā valviṉai Ilaṅkācopamum kāppuṟu niṟaipuṉal māp vilipaṅkamum viḷaippaintūṟu kalaittakkor pukaḻ talaittakkolamu n=ti tamāvalviṉai mātamaliṅkamuṅ kalāmutik kaṭun=ti ṟal Ilāmutitecamu n=te ṉakkalarpoḻil māṉakkavāramu n=to ṭukaṭaṟ kāvaṟ kaṭumuraṭ kaṭāramu māpporu taṇṭāṟ kkoṇṭa kkoppara kesarivanmarā na Uṭaiyār(r) śrīrājentraco ḻade vaṟkku yāṇṭu 10 6- Āṟāvatu jeyaṅkkoṇṭacoḻamaṇṭalattu Ūṟṟukkāṭṭukoṭṭattu nāṭṭu ciyapuramāṉa śrīparāntakaccaruppetimaṅkalattu sabhai yoṅ kaiyeḻuttu . Eyilnāṭṭu nakaraṅ kāñcipurattu tirukkāraikkāṭu maṭamuṭaiya tirukkāraikkāṭṭupiccan kaiyyā litde varpaṇṭārattu yāṅkaḷ koṇṭukaṭava pon dhanma kaṭṭaḷai kkallālt tuḷainiṟai pon nūṟṟukkaḻañcu Ippoṉ nūṟṟukkaḻañcum kaḻañcinvāy yāṇṭuvarai policai nel Arumoḻitevaṉmarakkālāl Irukalamāka neṟceytu van=ta palicai nel Irunūṟṟukkalam Iṉnel lirunūṟṟukkalamum Īramum patarum vālum Ulkum varakkūliyum nāṅkaḷe paṭṭu tirukkāraikkāṭuṭaiyār tirumuṟṟattey koṭuvan tu In=ta stā namuṭaiyārvacam Āṇṭu(ṇ)varai Ittevar paṇṭārattu Aḷan tu taravu koḷvommākavum . mutaṟpoṉ koḷka veṉṟu collappeṟā tomākavum . Iṉneṟ ṟa(ta)ṇṭa van=tā r
Imanṟupāṭu Iṟuttum Innel Irunūṟṟu yāṇṭutoṟu maḷappatākavum . Iṉnellukku virota niṉṟom kaṅkaiiṭaikkumariiṭaic ceytār ceyta pāvattup paṭuvatākavum Ippāvappaṭṭu Inneṟ can=ti rātittavaṟ Āṇṭutoṟum koṭuceṉṟu Aḷappatākac cilā muṟcollappaṭṭa ṭu ciyapuramāna śrīpirān=ta kacarup(peru)petimaṅkalattu sabhai yom . Ivarkaḷ paṇikka yeḻuti neṉ Ivvūr kkaraṇattāṉ nūṟṟuppatinaṟuvan vināyakaneṉ Ivai Eṉ neḻuttu Eṉṟum yāṇṭu 10 6vatu jayaṅkoṇṭacoḻamaṇṭalattu maṇaiyiṟkoṭṭattup puricaiṉāṭṭu tiruvūṟalpuṟattuaparāyi(rt)taccaruppetimaṅkalattu sabhaiyo ṅkaiyyeḻuttu . Eyiṟkoṭṭattu Eyilṉāṭṭu nakaraṅ kāñcipurattu tirukkārai kkāṭumaṭamuṭaiya tirukkāraikkāṭṭupiccaṉ kaiyyāl Ittevaṟ śrīpaṇṭārattil yāṅkaḷ koṇṭukaṭaviya poṉ tanma kaṭṭaḷaikkallāl tuḷainiṟai poṉ Aimpatiṉ kaḻaiñcu Ippoṉ Aimpatiṉ kaḻaiñcinukkum poṉ kaḻaiñcinukku Āṇṭuvarai Arumoḻitevanmarakkālāl nel Irukalamāka neṟceytu van=ta nel nūṟṟukkalamum Iṉnel nūṟṟukkalamum Īramum patarum puḻutiyum Ulkkum varakkūliyum ṉāṅkaḷe paṭṭu tirukkāraikkāṭuṭaiyār tirumuṟṟattukke koṭuvan tu In=ta stā ṉamuṭaiyārvacam paṇṭārat taḷan tu taravu koḷvatākavum . Immutaṟpoṉkoḷka veṉṟu collappeṟātomākavum .
puḷḷikuttuvikkavum peṟātatākavum . Immaṉṟupāṭi nel nūṟṟukkalamum can=ti rātittavaṟ Āṇṭutoṟu maḷappatākavum . Iṉṉe laḷappataṟku virotaniṉṟom keṅkaiiṭai kkumariiṭaic ceytār ceyta pāvattiṟ paṭuvatākavum Ip pāvampaṭṭu miṉṉeṟ can=ta rātittavaṟ Āṭṭāṇṭuto patākavum cilālekai ce colluppaṭi maṇaiyiṟkoṭṭa(koṭṭa)ttup puricaiṉāṭṭu tiruvūṟalpuṟattu Aparāyitaccaruppetimaṅkalattu sabhai yom . Ivarkaḷ paṇikka veḻutineṉ Ivvūr kkaraṇattāṉ taḷippaḷḷi kkālakālaneṉ Ivai Eṉ neḻuttu Eṉṟum ....yāṇṭu 10 6- v(ā)tu jayaṅkoṇṭacoḻamaṇṭalattu Eyiṟkoṭṭattu Eyilnāṭṭu [brahmade yam] ciykaccipeṭṭu sabhai yoṅ kaiyyeḻuttu . Ikkoṭṭattu Iṉnāṭṭu nakaraṅ kāñcipurattu tirukkāraikkāṭṭumaṭamuṭaiya mātevaṉ Uttamakitaṉāṉa tirukkāraikkāṭṭupiccaṉ kaiyyā littevar śrīpaṇṭārattu koṇṭukaṭava poṉ dharmma- kaṭṭaḷaikallāl tuḷainiṟai pon nūṟṟukkaḻañcum Ippoṉ nūṟṟukaḻañcinukkum poṉ kaḻañcinukku Āṭṭuvarai Arumoḻitevaṉmarakkālaāl Irukalam neṟceytu van=ta nel Irunūṟṟukkalamum Īramum patarum vāliṭum(p) pūḻutiyumRead puḻutiyum.nikki Ulkum vārakkūliyum ṉāṅkaḷe paṭṭu tirukkāraikkāṭuṭaiyār tirumuṟṟattukke koṭuvan tu stā namuṭaiyārvacam paṇṭārat taḷan tu taravu koḷvatākavum . Immutaṟpoṉ koḷka veṉṟu collappeṟātatākavum . Iṉnellut taṇṭavan=tā ṟku meykkaṇṭu coṟukuṭuppatākavum .
ṉel lirunūṟṟukkalamuñ can=ti rātittavaṟ Āṇṭutoṟu maḷappatākavum . Iṉṉellukku virotaniṉṟom kaṅkaiiṭai kkumariiṭai ceytār ceyta pāvattilp paṭuvatākavum . Ippāvappaṭṭum Iṉṉeṟ can=ti rātittavaṟ Āṭṭāṇṭu toṟum koṭuceṉṟu Aḷan tukuṭuppatākavum cilālekaiceytu kuṭuttom . koṭṭattu brahmade yam ciṟukac varkaḷ paṇikka veḻutineṉ Ivvūrk karaṇattāṉ puricainilaiyeṉ Ivai Eṉ neḻuttu ....yāṇṭu 10 6vatu jayaṅkoṇṭacoḻamaṇṭalattu Ūṟṟukkāṭṭukoṭṭattu Ūṟṟukkāṭṭunāṭṭu Uttamacoḻaccaruppetimaṅkalattu sabhai- yoṅ kaiyyeḻuttu . Eyiṟkoṭṭattu Eyilnāṭṭu ṉakaraṅ kāñcipurattu tirukkāraikkāṭṭu maṭamuṭaiya mātavaṉ Uttamakitaṉāna tirukkāraikkāṭṭu periyapiccaṉ kaiyyāl Ittevar śrīpaṇṭārattil yāṅkaḷ koṇṭukaṭava poṉ tanma kaṭṭaḷaikkallālt tuḷainiṟai poṉ nūṟṟukkaḻañcu . Ippoṉ ṉūṟṟukkakaḻañmkoṇṭaparicāvatu . poṉ kaḻaiñcinukku Āṇṭuvarai policai nellu Arumoḻitevanmarakkālāl nel lirukalamāka neṟceytu van=ta nel lirunūṟṟukkalamumiṉnel Irunūṟṟukkalamum Īramum patarum vālumRead puḻutiyum.pūḻutiyum [*ni]kkiy Ulkum varakkūliyum ṉāṅkaḷe paṭṭu tirukkāraikkāṭuṭaiyār tirumuṟṟatte koṭuvan tu In=ta stā ṉamuṭaiyārvacam Ittevar paṇṭārat taḷan tu taravu koḷvatākavum . Immutaṟpoṉ koḷka veṉṟu collappeṟātitākavum . Iṉṉelluttaṇṭavan=tā r
mākavum Immaṉṟupā ṭiṟuttu Innellu Irunūṟṟukkalamum can=ta rātittavaṟ Āṭṭāṇṭutoṟu maḷappatākavum . Iṉnellukku virota niṉṟom kaṅkaiiṭai kkumariiṭai ceytār ceyta pāpattiṟ paṭuvatākavum. Ippāvappaṭṭumpa Iṉṉel cantrā titya vaṟ Āṭṭāṇṭutoṟuṅ koṭuceṉṟu Arumoḻitevaṉ maḷantukuṭuppatākavum cilā tom muṟcollappaṭṭa Uttamacoḻacaruppetimaṅkalattu sabhai yom . Ivarkaḷ paṇippa Eḻutineṉ Ivvūr karaṇattān kumaracattita ṭaiyāṉ nālāyiravaneṉ Ivai En neḻuttu ....yāṇṭu 10 6Āvatu jayaṅkoṇṭacoḻamaṇṭalattu maṇaiyiṟkoṭṭattu kaṉṟūrnāṭṭu rumaḻalaimaṅkalattu sabhai yoṅ kaiyyeḻuttu . Eyiṟkoṭṭattu Eyilnāṭṭunakaraṅ kāñcipurattut tirukkāraikkāṭṭu maṭamuṭaiyā n māteva ṉuttamakitaṉāṉa tirukkāraikkāṭṭu periyapiccaṉ kaiyyā littirukkāraikkāṭuṭaiyār śrīpaṇṭārattil yāṅkaḷ koṇṭukaṭava poṉ taṉmakaṭṭaḷaikkallālt tuḷainiṟai poṉ nūṟṟukkaḻañcu . Ippoṉ nūṟṟukkaḻañcuṅ koṇṭaparicāvatu . poṉ kaḻañciṉukku Āṇṭuvarai policai Arumoḻitevaṉmarakkālāl nel Irukalamāka neṟceytu Ippoṉ nūṟṟukkaḻañcukku van=ta nel Irunūṟṟu kkalam Innel Irunūṟṟu kkalamum Īramum patarum vālum puḻutiyum nikkiy Ulkum varakkūliyum ṉāṅkaḷey paṭṭut tirukkāraikkāṭuṭaiyār tirumuṟṟattey koṭuvan tu can=ti rāti
tākavum . Itaṟtiṟampil dhanmāsa namutalākattāṉ veṇṭu kovukku nicatam kaḻañcupoṉ nāḷeṭuttu maṉṟap peṟuvatākavum . Immaṉṟupāṭu ceṉṟu niṉṟu maṟukkavum puḷḷikuttuvikkavum peṟātomākavum . manṟupā ṭiṟuttum Innel Irunūṟṟukkalamum cantrādi ttaval Āṭ tākavum Innellukku vi Iṭaik kumariiṭaic ceytār ceyta pāvattiṟ paṭuvatākavum . Ippāvappaṭṭum Innellu Irunūṟṟu kkalamum cantrā tittaval Āṭṭāṇṭutoṟum koṭuvan=tu Arumoḻitevaṉmarakkālāl Aḷan tu kuṭuppatāka cilālekai ceytukuṭuttom muṟcollappaṭṭa bhai yom paṇiyālivvūr kkaraṇattāṉ veṅkaṭavaṉ taṇiyaṉmalaiyeṉ Ivai Eṉ ṉeḻuttu ....muṉittevaṟku yāṇṭu 10 3Āvatu jayaṅkoṇṭacoḻamaṇṭalattu kāliyūrkoṭṭattu kkāliyūrnāṭṭu Orirukkaiūroṅ kaiyyeḻuttu . Eyiṟkoṭṭattu nakaraṅ kāñcipurattut tirukkāraikkāṭuṭaiyama hāde vaṟku Arttayāmattukku veṇṭum nivan=ta ttu In=ta stā na maṭamuṭaiya māteva ṉuttamakitaṉāṉa tirukkāraikkāṭṭup periyapiccaṉ tevarpaṇṭārattil vaitta poṉ taṉmakaṭṭaḷaikkallālt tuḷainiṟai poṉ patiṉaiṅkaḻañcu . Ikkaḷattūrkoṭṭattut taṉiyūr maturān=ta kaccaruppetimaṅkalattu maturān=ta kacceri veṟpuṟattu kkaṇṇaśanma n vaitta taṉmakaṭṭaḷai kkallālt tuḷainiṟai poṉ pa
nel kkalane tūṇip patakkup policaiyāka van=ta nel kalamum Ide vaṟku yāṇṭu 14Āvatu meṟpaṭiūrom tirukkāraikkāṭuṭaiyār śrīpaṇṭārattil Ātidāsaśaṇḍeśvara rpakkal Ide varkku Iṟukka veṇṭum nivan=ta ttukkut tuḷainiṟai taṉmakaṭṭaḷaikallāl koṇṭa muppa tiṉkaḻañcukkum poṉ kaḻañcuk Arumoḻitevaṉmarakkālāl nel Irukalaṉe mukku mukkuṟuṇi Āka neṟceytu van=ta nel Aṟu(pa)patteḻu kalaṉe tūṇip patakkum Āka nel nūṟṟorupattiru kalaṉe tūṇip patakku . Iṉṉel nūṟṟorupattiru kalaṉe tūṇippatakkum Īramum patarum vālum puḻutiyum nikki Ulkum varakkūliyum nāṅkaḷe paṭṭu stā namaṭamuṭaiyārvacam Ittevar śrīpaṇṭārattu Aḷan tu taravu koḷvomākavum . Immutaṟ pon koḷka Enṟu collappeṟātomākavum . Iṉṉel taṇṭavan=tā rkku meykkaṇṭu coṟu koṭuppatākavum . Itaṟtiṟampil dhanmāsa namutalāka tāṉ veṇṭu kovukku nicatam Irukaḻañcu poṉ nāḷeṭuttu maṉṟappeṟuvatākavum . Immaṉṟupāṭu ceṉṟu niṉṟu maṟukkavum puḷḷikuttuvikkavum peṟātatākavum . Immaṉ m Iṉṉel nūṟṟorupattiru kalaṉe can=ti rātittaval Āṇṭu kavum . Innellukku virotam niṉṟom kaṅkaiyiṭai kumariyiṭai ceytār ceyta pāvattiṟ paṭuvatākavum . Ippāvappaṭṭum Iṉnel can=ti rātittaval Āṭṭāṇṭutoṟum koṭuvan tu Aḷappatāka śi lālekai ceytukuṭuttom muṟcollappaā portion of the inscription was read from the stone. ā few words are damaged.
Digital edition of SII 8.5 by converted to DHARMA conventions by Dorotea Operato.
